block_01: As you probably already know, the new EU data protection law, the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) takes effect today, May 25th. We’ve updated our
block_05: to reflect the new legislation. Please take the time to review the updated policy carefully.
block_06: We’d like to take this opportunity to explain how IQ Option may use your information if you decide to share it with us:
block_07: To give you the best trading experience we would like to notify you about important market events (e.g. extreme price movements, upcoming earnings reports, etc.) via e-mail and/or push notifications on our mobile app.
block_08: You may also receive phone calls from your Personal manager to stay informed about offers exclusive to you or to receive support and assistance.
block_09: These services are free of charge and you can opt-out any time.
block_10:
To customize your notifications preferences,
click on the button below.
block_12: We appreciate your trust in us and take great care of your personal information. If you have any questions or concerns, our
block_14: staff will be more than happy to help you.
block_15: We wish you a pleasant trading experience!
